scripts.build:ordered: bun run --filter 'agent-scope' build && bun run --filter 'acp-core' build && bun run --filter 'wrkq-lib' build && bun run --filter 'coordination-substrate' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-config' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-runtime' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-claude' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-pi' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-pi-sdk' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-harness-codex' build && bun run --filter 'spaces-execution' build && bun run --filter 'agent-spaces' build && bun run --filter 'cli-kit' build && bun run --filter '@lherron/agent-spaces' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-core' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-sdk' build && bun run --filter 'acp-interface-store' build && bun run --filter 'acp-state-store' build && bun run --filter 'acp-admin-store' build && bun run --filter 'acp-jobs-store' build && bun run --filter 'acp-conversation' build && bun run --filter 'acp-ops-projection' build && bun run --filter 'acp-server' build && bun run --filter 'gateway-discord' build && bun run --filter 'acp-cli' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-events' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-store-sqlite' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-server' build && bun run --filter 'acp-e2e' build && bun run --filter 'hrc-cli' build && bun run --filter 'hrcchat-cli' build
scripts.test: bash -lc 'for pkg in "acp-admin-store" "acp-cli" "acp-conversation" "acp-core" "acp-e2e" "acp-interface-store" "acp-jobs-store" "acp-server" "acp-state-store" "agent-scope" "agent-spaces" "cli-kit" "@lherron/agent-spaces" "spaces-config" "coordination-substrate" "spaces-execution" "gateway-discord" "spaces-harness-claude" "spaces-harness-codex" "spaces-harness-pi-sdk" "spaces-harness-pi" "hrc-cli" "hrc-core" "hrc-events" "hrc-sdk" "hrc-server" "hrc-store-sqlite" "hrcchat-cli" "spaces-runtime" "wrkq-lib" "spaces-integration-tests"; do bun run --filter "$pkg" test || exit $?; done'
scripts.rebuild: bun run clean && bun run build
